data.name: Working Sakuya
data.detailed_description:
This game is a visual novel game consisting of animation for adults.
A collection of slimy erotic videos sent in 30fps animation (*MP4 for mobile available)

----------------------------------------------------------------------
■Sakuya starts off inexperienced, but gradually improves her techniques...


■Keeps your hands off her for a while, and her lust will be uncontrollable...


■contents
Sex Scenes: 9 Types + Conversation Part
Number Of Video Files: 114 (with Mp4 For Mobile)

・first Night
・piston
・fellatio(lv.1)
・cowgirl
・fellatio(lv.2)
・bath
・fellatio(lv.3)
・runaway Mode


【basic Action】
Talk → Hold → Penetrate → Soft → Hard → Orgasm → Continue → Finish
Move each scene with one click

----------------------------------------------------------------------
■MP4 data included
■■■mp4■■■ in the local file contains video data with the same content as the game.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: windows10
  • 處理器: 2GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
